#  Apache Flink Agents 0.2.1 Release Announcement
March 26, 2026 - Wenjin Xie
The Apache Flink Community is pleased to announce the first bug fix release of the Flink-Agents 0.2 series.
This release includes 3 bug fixes, vulnerability fixes…
